zh.Widdrington, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德維德林頓
zh.Widdrington, Northumberland, England, Un: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德維德林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Widdrington於大約1306年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德維德林頓時，他的父親John de Widdrington31歲，母親Christiana Swinburne33歲。他於大約1334年與Elizabeth Acton在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德維德林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1372年4月13日在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.Widdrington, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德維德林頓
zh-hans.Widdrington, Northumberland, England, Un: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德維德林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Widdrington于大约1306年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德維德林頓时，他的父亲John de Widdrington31岁，母亲Christiana Swinburne33岁。他于大约1334年与Elizabeth Acton在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德維德林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1372年4月13日在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Widdrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative from Widdrington (Northumb), recorded as Vuderintuna, about 1160.

variants.name: Wethington
meanings: English: habitational name, a shortened form of   Wetherington  .

variants.name: Wetherington
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Widdrington (Northumberland). The placename derives from an Old English personal name Widuhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Witherington
meanings: English: either a variant of Wetherington , or perhaps a habitational name from Witherenden in Ticehurst (Sussex), Witherden Farm in Headcorn (Kent), or a lost place called Witherington or similar. The Sussex and Kent placenames probably derive from an Old English personal name Wither + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘woodland pasture’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Widdrington was born about 1306, in Widdrington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Widdrington, was 31 and his mother, Christiana Swinburne, was 33. He married Elizabeth Acton about 1334, in Widdrington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 13 April 1372, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Widdrington est né environ 1306, à Widdrington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Widdrington, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Christiana Swinburne, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Acton environ 1334, à Widdrington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1372, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Widdrington um 1306 in Widdrington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Widdrington 31 und seine Mutter Christiana Swinburne 33. Er hat um 1334 in Widdrington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Acton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. April 1372 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Widdrington è nato il circa 1306 nel Widdrington, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Widdrington, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Swinburne, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Acton circa 1334, nel Widdrington, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1372, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Widdrington, Northumberland, England, Un: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウィッドリントン
ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Widdringtonが約1306年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウィッドリントンで生まれた時，父John de Widdringtonは31歳，母Christiana Swinburneは33歳であった。約1334年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウィッドリントンでElizabeth Actonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1372年4月13日に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Widdrington(이)가 대략 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 위드링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Widdrington(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Swinburne(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 위드링턴에서 Elizabeth Acton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 4월 13일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Widdrington nasceu aproximadamente 1306, em Widdrington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Widdrington, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Swinburne, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Acton aproximadamente 1334, em Widdrington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1372, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Widdrington родился около 1306 г. в местности виддрингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Widdrington было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Christiana Swinburne, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Acton около 1334 г. в местности виддрингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 13 апреля 1372 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Widdrington nació aproximadamente 1306, en Widdrington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Widdrington, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Christiana Swinburne, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Acton aproximadamente 1334, en Widdrington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1372, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
